title: ITI Jobs 2026 – Various Posts
shortInfo: AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026: 19 Restoration Engineer, Asst. Manager and More vacancies. Apply online from 21 May to 11 June 2026 at ahmedabadcity.gov.in.

Expert: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Administrative Coordinator/ Office Superintendent: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Conservation Architects: Minimum 27 Years, Maximum 37 Years Draft Person: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Senior Executive – Tourism Cell: Minimum 28 Years, Maximum 40 Years Manager Creative Communication & Branding: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 40 Years Asst. Manager - Tourism Planning & Community Programmes: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Asst. Manager Visitor Experience & Operations: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Asst. Manager Tourism Data & Digital Platforms: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years

age_limit.details: Historian /Social Science Expert: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 40 Years Assistant Director: Minimum 35 Years, Maximum 45 Years Assistant Architects: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years G.I.S. Expert: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Administrative Coordinator/ Office Superintendent: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Conservation Architects: Minimum 27 Years, Maximum 37 Years Draft Person: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Senior Executive – Tourism Cell: Minimum 28 Years, Maximum 40 Years Manager Creative Communication & Branding: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 40 Years Asst. Manager - Tourism Planning & Community Programmes: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Asst. Manager Visitor Experience & Operations: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years Asst. Manager Tourism Data & Digital Platforms: Minimum 25 Years, Maximum 35 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in History/Archaeology/Anthropology/Sociology/Heritage Management/Cultural Studies, Bachelor's in Architecture, M.Arch, ITI/Diploma/Higher Degree in Draftsmanship/Architecture/Civil Engineering, Master's in Tourism/Business Management/Urban Planning, Master's in Mass Communication/Visual Communication/Design/Journalism, Master's in Social Work/Heritage Management/Development Studies/Economics, Bachelor's or Master's in Tourism Management/Event Management/Hospitality/Business Administration, Master's in IT/Computer Science/Data Science, Retired Assistant Civil Engineer, Retired Technical Supervisor
qualification.details: Historian /Social Science Expert: Masters in History / Archaeology / Anthropology / Sociology / Heritage Management / Cultural Studies with 5 years of experience in stakeholder consultation/ public outreach, research, documentation, and heritage interpretation. Assistant Director: Bachelor's in Architecture with 10 years of experience with the Council of Architecture (CoA), or B.Arch + Master's in Management / Public Administration / Heritage Management with 4 years of experience. Assistant Architects: B.Arch with 02 years experience. G.I.S. Expert: Master's/Bachelor's in Geography, Geoinformatics, Urban Planning, or related field with 3 years of experience in GIS mapping, spatial analysis, and data management. Administrative Coordinator/ Office Superintendent: Bachelor's in Public / Business Administration, Management, Commerce, Urban/ Heritage Management, or related field; post graduation in Public/Business Administration, Project Management, Urban Governance, or Urban/ Heritage Management with minimum 5 years' experience in administrative coordination. Or a retired AMC employee from the post of Office Superintendent or above. Conservation Architects: M.Arch (Conservation) with 2 Years of Experience in Architectural Heritage conservation field. Draft Person: ITI / Diploma / higher degree in Draftsmanship / Architecture / Civil Engineering from a recognized institution with Min 3 years' experience in drafting, technical documentation. Senior Executive – Tourism Cell: Master's in Tourism, Business Management, Urban Planning, or related fields with a tourism/heritage focus, with 5+ years experience. Manager Creative Communication & Branding: Master's in Mass Communication, Visual Communication, Design, Journalism, or related fields with a tourism/heritage focus, with 4+ years in branding, tourism promotion, or public communication. Asst. Manager - Tourism Planning & Community Programmes: Master's in Social Work, Heritage Management, Development Studies, or Economics or related fields with a tourism/heritage focus, with 2+ years in community-based tourism or development projects. Asst. Manager Visitor Experience & Operations: Bachelor's or Master's in Tourism Management, Event Management, Hospitality, or Business Administration or related fields with a tourism/heritage focus, with 2+ years in tourism or city-level operations. Asst. Manager Tourism Data & Digital Platforms: Master's in IT, Computer Science, Data Science or related fields with a tourism/heritage focus, with 2+ years in data analytics or digital platform management. Restoration Engineer: Retired Assistant Civil Engineer and above officer of Engineering department of AMC. Restoration Supervisor: Retired Technical Supervisor and above officer of Engineering department of AMC.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ahmedabadcity.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for AWHCT AMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 19 vacancies are available for various posts in the Ahmadabad World Heritage City Trust (AWHCT AMC) Recruitment 2026. These include positions like Historian, Assistant Architects, and more.

faq.question: What is the minimum and maximum age limit for AWHCT AMC jobs?
faq.answer: The general age limit for most posts ranges from a minimum of 25 years to a maximum of 45 years. Specific age limits may vary for different positions as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: What is the application fee for AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for the General Category and Rs. 250/- for EWS, SEBC, SC, ST, and other reserved categories. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application can be submitted through both Online and Offline modes. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific instructions on how to apply for each post.

faq.question: What is the salary range for the AWHCT AMC posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the various posts ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 80,000/- per month. Specific salaries are mentioned for each post in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for AWHCT AMC Recruitment?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary significantly by post, ranging from ITI/Diploma to Master's degrees in fields like History, Architecture, Tourism, IT, and more. Retired engineers are also eligible for specific roles.

faq.question: Where can I download the AWHCT AMC application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Ahmadabad World Heritage City Trust, which is www.ahmedabadcity.gov.in.

faq.question: What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates belonging to reserved categories are advised to refer to the official notification for any applicable age relaxations.
